ListingGrid.heading: Next journey starts here
ListingGrid.subheading: Book confidently. Travel freely. Find the perfect car or apartment for your next adventure.

hero.title: Built for the way people travel today
hero.description: RentHub connects travellers with trusted cars and apartments — making every journey simpler, safer, and more memorable.

verified.title: Verified listings only
verified.desc: Every car and apartment on RentHub is manually reviewed before going live. No surprises, no misrepresentation — just honest listings.

booking.title: Booking in minutes
booking.desc: Search, select, and confirm your booking in a few taps. No phone calls, no paperwork — the whole process lives in your pocket.

support.title: We're here when you need us
support.desc: Our support team is available every day of the week. Whether it's a question before booking or an issue during your stay, we've got you covered.

history.title: A platform born from frustration
history.para1: RentHub started with a simple problem — finding a reliable car or apartment rental in Algeria was harder than it needed to be. Scattered listings, no clear pricing, and zero trust signals made the process stressful for everyone.
history.para2: We built RentHub to change that. A single platform where every listing is verified, every price is transparent, and every booking is protected.
history.para3: Today, we serve guests across multiple cities, and we're growing every month. We're proud of what we've built — and we're just getting started.

cta.title: Ready to find your next rental?
cta.desc: Browse cars and apartments — no account needed to explore.

Footer.description: Your trusted platform for car and apartment rentals across Algeria. We connect travelers with quality vehicles and comfortable accommodations for memorable experiences.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.description: Find quick answers to the most common questions about bookings, payments, cancellations, and more.

cta.title: Still have questions?
cta.desc: Our support team is available every day. We're happy to help.

items.q: How do I make a booking on RentHub?
items.a: To make a booking, browse our listings, select your preferred property or car, and follow the booking instructions.

items.q: Can I book without creating an account?
items.a: No, you need to create an account to book and manage your reservations.

items.q: How do I know my booking is confirmed?
items.a: You will receive a confirmation email and can view your booking in your account dashboard.

items.q: Can I book for someone else?
items.a: Yes, you can book for someone else. Please provide their details during the booking process.

items.q: What payment methods are accepted?
items.a: We accept major credit cards, debit cards, and other secure payment methods.

items.q: Is my payment information safe?
items.a: Yes, we use industry-standard encryption to protect your payment information.

items.q: When is my card charged?
items.a: Your card is charged at the time of booking.

items.q: Will I receive a receipt?
items.a: Yes, a receipt will be sent to your email after payment is processed.

items.q: How do I cancel a booking?
items.a: Go to your account dashboard, select the booking, and click 'Cancel'.

items.q: What is the cancellation policy?
items.a: Our cancellation policy varies by listing. Please check the listing details for specifics.

items.q: How long does a refund take?
items.a: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after cancellation.

items.q: What if the host cancels my booking?
items.a: You will receive a full refund and assistance in finding a new place.

items.q: What documents do I need to rent a car?
items.a: A valid driver's license and a credit card are required.

items.q: Is insurance included in the car rental price?
items.a: Insurance details are provided in each car listing. Please review before booking.

items.q: Can I pick up and drop off at different locations?
items.a: Some listings allow this. Check the listing or contact support for details.

items.q: What happens if I return the car late?
items.a: Late returns may incur additional charges. Please check the rental agreement.

items.q: Is check-in always on the listed date?
items.a: Yes, check-in is on the date specified in your booking.

items.q: Are utilities included in the apartment price?
items.a: Most apartments include utilities. Check the listing for details.

items.q: What if the apartment doesn't match the listing description?
items.a: Contact support immediately. We will help resolve the issue.

items.q: Can I extend my stay?
items.a: Yes, you can request an extension through your account dashboard.

items.q: How do I change my password?
items.a: Go to account settings and select 'Change Password'.

items.q: Can I delete my account?
items.a: Yes, contact support to request account deletion.

items.q: How do I update my profile photo?
items.a: Go to your profile and click 'Edit' to upload a new photo.

items.q: How does RentHub prevent fraud?
items.a: We verify listings and use secure payment systems to protect users.

items.q: What should I do if I feel unsafe?
items.a: Contact our support team immediately for assistance.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights as a user of RentHub.

s1.title: 1. Information We Collect
s1.content: We collect information you provide directly (name, email, phone, payment details) and data generated by your use of the platform (search history, booking activity, device info).

s3.title: 3. Data Sharing
s3.content: We do not sell your personal data. We share data only with:
list: Hosting service providers for platform infrastructure
Legal authorities when required by law
s3.note: We will never sell your personal information to third-party advertisers.

s4.title: 4. Cookies & Tracking
s4.content: RentHub uses cookies to maintain session state, remember preferences, and analyze usage. You can manage cookie preferences in your browser settings or via our cookie banner.

s5.title: 5. Data Retention
s5.content: We retain your account data for as long as your account is active. Booking records are retained for 5 years for legal and financial compliance.

s6.title: 6. Your Rights
list: Access the personal data we hold about you
Request deletion of your account and associated data
Withdraw consent for marketing communications at any time

s7.title: 7. Third-Party Services
s7.content: Our platform integrates with Stripe (payments), Google Maps (location display), and WhatsApp (support). These services have their own privacy policies which we encourage you to review.

s8.title: 8. Children's Privacy
s8.content: RentHub is not directed at children under 18. We do not knowingly collect data from minors.

s9.title: 9. Security
s9.content: We use industry-standard encryption (SSL/TLS) to protect data in transit. Passwords are hashed and never stored in plain text.

s10.title: 10. Changes to This Policy
s10.content: We may update this policy periodically. We will notify registered users of significant changes via email.

s11.title: 11. Contact Us
s11.content: For privacy-related requests, contact us at: support@renthub.com

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.intro: By accessing or using RentHub, you agree to be bound by the following terms and conditions. Please read them carefully before making any bookings or using any features of the platform.

s1.title: Acceptance of Terms
s1.content: By accessing RentHub, you confirm that you are at least 18 years of age and agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, you must not use the platform.

s2.title: Use of the Platform
s2.content: RentHub grants you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to access the platform for personal, non-commercial use. You may not scrape, copy, or reproduce content without written permission.

s3.title: User Accounts
s3.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.

s4.title: Bookings & Payments
s4.content: All bookings are subject to availability confirmation. Payment is processed securely through Stripe. RentHub applies a service fee on each transaction, the rate of which is displayed at checkout.
s4.note: Bookings are only confirmed once payment is successfully processed. Pending bookings do not guarantee availability.

s5.title: Cancellation Policy
s5.content: Cancellation terms vary per listing. The applicable policy is displayed on each listing page and at the booking confirmation step. RentHub's service fee is non-refundable unless otherwise stated.

s6.title: Host Responsibilities
s6.content: Hosts (listing managers) are responsible for the accuracy of their listings, the condition of the property or vehicle, and compliance with all local laws and regulations.

s7.title: Prohibited Conduct
list: Use the platform for any unlawful purpose
Attempt to circumvent the platform to book directly and avoid fees
Harass or threaten other users or hosts

s8.title: Intellectual Property
s8.content: All content on RentHub, including logos, copy, and design, is the property of RentHub. You may not reproduce or distribute any content without written consent.

s9.title: Limitation of Liability
s9.content: RentHub is a marketplace platform and is not liable for the actions of hosts, the condition of listings, or any damages arising from bookings made through the platform.

s10.title: Privacy & Data
s10.content: Your use of the platform is also governed by our Privacy Policy. By using RentHub, you consent to the collection and use of your data as described therein.

s11.title: Changes to Terms
s11.content: RentHub reserves the right to update these Terms at any time. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes your acceptance of the updated Terms.

s12.title: Contact & Disputes
s12.content: For any questions regarding these Terms, please contact us at legal@renthub.com. Disputes will be resolved under the laws of Algeria.
